top_signals.title: Cathay Bank Chairman Quits After Governance Dispute, Family Feud
top_signals.summary: Cathay United Bank Co. Chairman Kuo Ming-jian has resigned following a regulatory breach at the lender’s asset management affiliate linked to his outside positions, an incident that culminated in a physical altercation with a member of Taiwan’s billionaire Tsai family.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Core inflation rate hit 3.4% in May, highest since October 2023, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
top_signals.summary: The personal consumption expenditures price index was expected to show a 4.1% annual increase.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: China detains two Japanese nationals over alleged rare earth smuggling - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: China detains two Japanese nationals over alleged rare earth smuggling  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Micron earnings, oil prices fall, the newest meme stock and more in Morning Squawk
top_signals.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Coinbase's Base blockchain resumes after two-hour outage disrupted network
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Crypto infrastructure firm BitGo lays off 15% of staff
top_signals.summary: BitGo co-founder and CEO Mike Belshe says the layoffs are “a one-time action” and the company doesn’t see the need for further staff reductions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: U.S. International Transactions and Investment Position, 1st Quarter 2026 and Annual Update
Remarks by Commissioner Hoekstra at the ENVI Council
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Luxembourg, 25 Jun 2026 Ladies and gentlemen,
Very good evening, I have been thanking you more often for your tenacity. Thank you very much for being here.
This morning at the doorstep...
